module.name: hal_serial_usb
module.details: This module implements a CDC-ACM serial channel on top of the generic USB CDC service class. The USB driver and device binder remain external; this module adds buffered channel semantics, queue handling, and serial-oriented flow control on top of the CDC transport.

config.name: SERIAL_USB_BUFFERS_SIZE
config.brief: Size of each TX/RX staging area.

config.name: SERIAL_USB_SEND_ZLP
config.brief: Enables zero-length packet transmission when required.

config.name: SERIAL_USB_RX_PACKET_MODE
config.brief: Limits OUT transfers to endpoint packet size.

definitions_late.verbatim:
#if (SERIAL_USB_SEND_ZLP != FALSE) && (SERIAL_USB_SEND_ZLP != TRUE) #error "invalid SERIAL_USB_SEND_ZLP value" #endif
#if (SERIAL_USB_RX_PACKET_MODE != FALSE) && (SERIAL_USB_RX_PACKET_MODE != TRUE) #error "invalid SERIAL_USB_RX_PACKET_MODE value" #endif

class.name: hal_serial_usb_driver
class.details: This class adds buffered asynchronous-channel behavior on top of the generic USB CDC service base class.

field.name: txsync
field.brief: Optional thread waiting for TX drain.

method.implementation: sdu_add_flags_i(self, CHN_FL_DISCONNECTED); sdu_reset_queues_i(self, MSG_RESET);
sdu_add_flags_i(self, CHN_FL_CONNECTED); (void)sdu_start_receive_i(self);
(void)sdu_try_transmit_i(self, true);
sdu_data_transmitted_i(self, self->config->usbp, ep);
sdu_data_received_i(self, self->config->usbp, ep);
(void)self; (void)ep;
(void)self;

function.name: sduGetLineCodingX
function.brief: Returns the current CDC line coding.
function.return: Pointer to the current CDC line coding.

function.name: sduGetServiceX
function.brief: Returns the USB service view of the serial driver.
function.return: Pointer to the embedded USB service base.

function.name: sduStart
function.brief: Starts a serial USB driver instance.

function.name: sduStop
function.brief: Stops a serial USB driver instance.
